label: Distributed data pipelines & streaming

node.label: Distributed data pipelines & streaming
node.definition: Distributed data pipelines ingest, transform, validate, shuffle, stream, cache, and feed training or inference workloads at sustained throughput.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Distributed data pipelines & streaming is to connect Distributed systems & networking, Databases & information retrieval to downstream capabilities including Workflow, cluster & job orchestration, Model registry, versioning & MLOps / LLMOps.
examples: substrate for Workflow, cluster & job orchestration
substrate for Model registry, versioning & MLOps / LLMOps
limitations: Operational gains introduce new failure modes in concurrency, versioning, security, numerical behavior, observability, and cost. Its direct dependencies include Distributed systems & networking, Databases & information retrieval.

dependencies.rationale: Distributed data pipelines & streaming turns Distributed systems & networking into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
Distributed data pipelines & streaming turns Databases & information retrieval into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
Distributed data pipelines & streaming turns Data collection, curation & filtering into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
Distributed data pipelines & streaming turns Multimodal, simulated & streaming data into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
